description: Restorative magic mending wounds, curing ailments, and shielding the body from harm.
abilities: A touch hardens skin into a stony shell. Blades skitter across it. Fists bruise against it. Then it cracks away, leaving the skin unmarked.
A hummed melody summons wisps from the ages of creation. Ancient beings of light burn their last energy like dying stars, restoring vitality to all living things nearby.
Sacred words of forgiveness dissolve a creature's guilt. Lesser souls become awestruck and devoted. Even powerful enemies find their hostility briefly stayed.
A caring touch that mends all wounds and relieves every impairment. Flesh knits, pain fades, and the creature is restored. Permanent conditions remain beyond reach.
Gentle energy through a touch, knitting minor cuts and bruises. Quiet, nurturing magic for after the danger passes. Too delicate for grievous wounds.
A loving word and a touch floods a creature with vitality, closing wounds and rousing the unconscious. The caster may sacrifice their own health to fuel it.
Words of comfort wrapping a creature in profound well-being. Anxiety, pain, and fear banished entirely, leaving immunity to terror for a merciful stretch of calm.
A healer's eye scavenges the area for the right leaves, roots, or bark. A single dose that purges illness and neutralizes poison.
The most potent healing, requiring sustained contact beyond danger. Over several minutes, every wound closes, every ailment purges, every trace of damage undone.
